title: pileanthus septentrionalis
intro: Pileanthus septentrionalis, also known as Northern pileanthus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pileanthus septentrionalis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Pileanthus septentrionalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
